description_long: This is a compact, single-propeller airplane with a robust, somewhat stylized design reminiscent of classic warbirds. The fuselage is primarily gray with yellow accents on the nose, tail, and wingtips, and features a visible cockpit with a single seat and a rounded windscreen. The wings are straight and mounted at a mid-level position, with subtle dihedral angles and no visible winglets. The engine is a prominent radial piston type, with a three-blade propeller at the front and detailed exhausts along the sides. The tail section has a conventional layout with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, both accented in yellow. The landing gear is fixed, with two main wheels under the wings and a small tailwheel, suitable for ground operations on paved or unpaved surfaces.
description: A compact, gray and yellow single-propeller airplane with a mid-mounted straight wing, open cockpit, and fixed taildragger landing gear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the yellow-tipped tail, open cockpit, and fixed main landing gear under the wing.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the three-blade propeller, radial engine, and symmetrical wing layout.
description_view_2: Opposite side view revealing the cockpit, engine details, and tailwheel configuration.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the single vertical stabilizer, horizontal stabilizers, and tailwheel.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, straight wings with slight dihedral angle and no winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted radial piston engine with three-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and one tailwheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open single-seat cockpit with rounded windscreen.
